code: import React,{useState}from'react';import{useNavigate}from'react-router-dom';import{adminLogin}from'../api';import{useApp}from'../context/AppContext';import toast from'react-hot-toast';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const AdminLoginPage=()=>{const[password,setPassword]=useState('');const[loading,setLoading]=useState(false);const{loginAdmin}=useApp();const navigate=useNavigate();const handleSubmit=async e=>{e.preventDefault();setLoading(true);try{const res=await adminLogin(password);if(res.data.success){loginAdmin();toast.success('Welcome back, Admin!
